s: Kaleidoscope Camera Fun with Shaders for live visual performances!
d:
SpaceBeam transforms your camera feed into a psychedelic, real-time geometry pattern generator. It transmits the image as a second screen
    to be shared over miracast or hdmi.
    
    Features:
    * kaleidoscope effects
    * Front/Back Camera as Input source
    * RTSP as input-source
    * Image/Video (playlists) as input-source
    * Generative Shaders as input-source
    * Feedback as input-source
    * Different merge modes (add, subtract, multiply ...)
    * Accelerometer as modulation for parameters
    * Bluetooth MIDI controller as modulation source
    * BPM tap and beat synced LFOs
    * 9 presets slots with smooth transitions between presets
    * Auto-Play mode
    * Undo/Redo buttons

    Recommended Setup:
    Run this app on a Samsung Android device (e.g. Samsung S20 FE). Samsung is the only system still supporting miracast. Look for the option "Smart View".
    Connect to any smart TV/Projector that supports miracast. Or connect to a miracast-hdmi-dongle.
    Optional: Use a second phone as remote camera. Take the second phone, install "IP Webcam" app.
    On main phone, host a wifi hotspot, or bring both phones into the same external wifi.
    Select the rtsp input in the app and enter the address "rtsp://192.168.30.40:8080/h264_ulaw.sdp" (the IP adress is shown on the remote cam phone when the server is running).
    You should get a remote image from the second phone through quite some distance.
    Alternatively to using IP Camera, you can use "Screen Stream" App to share another phones screen and make visuals out of any app (recommended apps: Fluid, Frakls ..)

    This way you can very easily create stunning visual art setups all just with a phone and not tons of cabling and heavy computers with expensive software.

    Hope you enjoy this, if you do, send me a mail :)
    info@calmyjane.com
    www.calmyjane.com

Permission Notes:
Network Usage is needed for streaming Videos from other devices into the app. The app does not communicate with the internet. If your OS allows, you can block Network Usage for the app, this will cause error message when trying to add RTSP sources, but otherwise won't affect the apps performance.

Modifying System Settings is needed to force the screen timeout to infinite. The "keep screen on" flag doesnt work on all devices, if your screen turns black you can force it on in the settings menu. This needs permission to modify system settings. No other settings except screen timeout are touched by the app.
